content.full_text:
Sept. 18, 1990

Mark Moradomi, Esq.
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, Calif. 95812

Re: Friends of Robert Garcia

Dear Mr. Moradomi,

Thank you for taking the time to answer my question regarding appreciation picnics for volunteers. You stated that political campaign funds could be used for a appreciation picnic even though I lost the election.

If this is incorrect please let me know.

Very truly yours,

Robert A. Garcia
Attorney at Law

RG:sp
Enclosure
